title: cola octoloboides
intro: Cola octoloboides, a species of flowering plant in the family Malvaceae, is commonly known as the kola nut or bitter kola. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cola octoloboides include reducing fever, relieving coughs, and supporting respiratory health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being dried and powdered for use in traditional remedies.
